Opensea cafe is born from the idea of a unique space that offers visitors a tropical escape within the city 


you only have to call, order, and we take the order to any side of the park

ENJOY

Thinking of your comfort, we offer the service of chair and umbrella rentals, so that you and your family are comfortable at all times 


Explore the whole park with our bicycle and quad rental service, and connect with nature
